headline: **MLB Daily Recap**
article:
The Philadelphia Phillies secured a thrilling 11-9 win over the Pittsburgh Pirates, led by Kyle Schwarber's 3-hit, 2-home run performance. The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, thanks to Zack Littell's 5.0 innings of scoreless relief. The Detroit Tigers took down the Toronto Blue Jays in a thrilling finish, with Andrés Giménez leading the Blue Jays' offense.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Ben Joyce (Los Angeles Angels) who was placed on the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. Trevor Story (Boston Red Sox) was placed on the 10-day injured list retroactive to May 15, 2026, with a sports hernia. Clay Holmes (New York Mets) was placed on the 15-day injured list with a right fibula fracture.

The Chicago White Sox acquired Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for LHP Jackson Nove. The Athletics also traded RHP Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for 2B Alika Williams, and RHP Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash.

top_news.title: **Phillies Take Thrilling 11-9 Win Over Pirates**
top_news.summary: The Philadelphia Phillies outlasted the Pittsburgh Pirates in a high-scoring matchup, securing an 11-9 victory. Kyle Schwarber led the Phillies' offense with a 3-hit, 2-home run performance, driving in 5 runs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Take Down Orioles in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals edged out the Baltimore Orioles 3-2, securing a narrow victory. Zack Littell led the Nationals to the win, pitching 5.0 innings with 3 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Tigers Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 3-2, securing a narrow victory. Andrés Giménez led the Blue Jays with 1 hit, 2 RBI, and 3 at-bats, while Trey Yesavage pitched 6 strong innings for the Blue Jays with 6 strikeouts and 2 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Reds Edge Guardians in Thrilling 7-6 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds took down the Cleveland Guardians 7-6, securing a hard-fought win. Matt McLain led the Reds' offense with a strong performance, going 2-for-3 with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays secured a narrow win over the Detroit Tigers, with a final score of 2-1. Impact hitters for the Blue Jays included Yohendrick Piñango, Daulton Varsho, Kevin McGonigle, and Matt Vierling.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, handing the Royals their loss. Impact hitters for the Cardinals included Jac Caglianone, Nathan Church, and Victor Scott II.

top_news.title: **Ben Joyce Placed on 60-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels right-handed pitcher Ben Joyce has been placed on the 60-day injured list due to right shoulder inflammation. This move is a status change for the team.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove.
